chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C. P. No.D-731 of 2076 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 22.9.2016 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For Katcha Peshi. Mr. Mohammad Ali Pirzado, advocate for petitioners. Mr. Qaz,i Mohammad Bux, State Counsel. Mr. Habibullah G. Ghouri, advocate for respondents No.4 to 6 Comments filed by respondent No.3 are taken on record. Copy thereof has been supplied to learned Counsel for the petitioners. SHO P.S Gerelo, the respondent No.l, has already filed his comments, -,*.tttti aq - q wherein he has stated that^ hi.rassment has been caused to the petitioner at the instance of private respondents nor would be done in future. The learned Counsel for private respondents submits that they have neither caused any harassment to the petitioner nor intend to do so in future..r The Counsel for the petitioners being satisfled seeks disposal of the petition in the light of statement of official respondents and the statement of Counsel for private respondents. Order accordingly, petition stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE \^\ -v,g -y
